arts.ttl: ‘It’s always been the way at Millwall…it takes time’ - Millwall boss comments on summer signing’s growing influence
arts.sum: “It’s always been the way at our football club – it takes time,” said Harris, when asked about Azeez beginning to deliver strong displays. Millwall head coach Neil Harris has talked about the form of summer signing Femi Azeez.

arts.ttl: Sunderland facing lengthy spell without two players as Regis Le Bris shares new injury update
arts.sum: Sunderland head coach Regis Le Bris has confirmed that Alan Browne and Romaine Mundle will both be out… The post Sunderland facing lengthy spell without two players as Regis Le Bris shares new injury update appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
